Title: Magical Merfolk and Fairy Scene Sticker Set
Description:
Celebrate the magic of the deep sea and flying spirits with this enchanting sticker design. This beautiful art piece features a vibrant merfolk character swimming alongside a whimsical fairy, accompanied by a delicate butterfly.

The bright turquoise background and lively figures make this sticker perfect for adding a touch of fantasy to any surface. Whether decorating a notebook, laptop, journal, or scrapbook, this sticker captures the wonder of mythical creatures.

  • Vibrant Colors: The bright, aquatic color palette makes this design eye-catching and cheerful.
  • Ideal Gift: Makes a wonderful, thoughtful gift for fans of fantasy, ocean themes, or magical creatures.
  • Durable Finish: High-quality material ensures the colors remain vivid and the sticker lasts for years.

Perfect for mermaid lovers, fantasy art collectors, and anyone who finds joy in magical stories.
